        public BooleanProperty enable

    • ąąÔěĆ÷ĎęĎ¸×ĘÁĎ

      • SymbologyBase

        public SymbologyBase()
        This is an empty constructor that will not be used. In the implementation a different one protected/private will be invoked. Leave it empty, do not implement. This avoids breaking code if the class is extended.
